About Johnny Lawn Aeration

12+ years serving Boise and surrounding areas

Johnny Lawn Aeration started with a simple idea: to provide reliable, high-quality landscaping services to our neighbors in Boise. We're a family-owned business, deeply rooted in this community, and committed to making Boise even more beautiful, one lawn at a time.

Our approach is simple: hard work, clear communication, and attention to detail. We believe in doing the job right the first time, every time. We use proven techniques and quality materials to ensure lasting results, tailored to Boise's unique climate challenges.

We're not just another landscaping company; we're your neighbors. We support local schools, participate in community events, and strive to be a positive force in Boise. When you choose Johnny Lawn Aeration, you're supporting a business that invests back into our community.

12+ Years in Business
800+ Projects Completed
97% Client Satisfaction
20+ Team Members
Johnny Lawn Aeration

Trusted landscaping company professionals serving Boise, ID and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
